title: GastroMax Clear Microwave Cover for Food 25cm Wide w/Air Vent - BPA Free Plastic Food Safe Microwave Oven Plate Cover - Dishwasher Safe Microwave Food Cover Max 100 Degrees Celsius Heat Resistance
features: MICROWAVE SPLATTER GUARD FOR COOKING/REHEATING FOOD: Cut out cling film with our reusable microwave plate cover. The lid (max heat-resistance 100°C ) prevents food splatters so your microwave doesn't need cleaning every time you use it.

MICROWAVE DISHES PERFECTLY EVERY TIME: By trapping heat and moisture, a microwave cover reheats food evenly ensuring it's not dried out or soggy. The lid's air vent lets out steam so meals come out just right every time.

VERSATILE PLATE COVERS FOR FOOD: This lid (25cm x 8cm) fits inside most microwave ovens, including smaller models. It can also double as a cake cover or keep food warm while you're busy with other steps of cooking.
EASY TO CLEAN MICROWAVE LID COVER FOR FOOD: Quickly clean the microwave cover lid by either hand washing it or popping it in the dishwasher.
FOOD SAFE MICROWAVE COVERS: Made in Finland, GastroMax microwave plate covers are BPA free and meet all EU regulations for food contact materials.
description: From the manufacturer Reheat smarter. Keep your microwave spotless and your meals perfectly moist with the GastroMax Microwave Plate Cover Goodbye Splatter, Hello Clean Microwave Keep your microwave spotless, no more mess, no more splashes. The Orthex microwave cover traps splatter before it happens. More Than a Cover, A Kitchen Essential Use it beyond reheating: as a cake cover, a table food guard, or to keep dishes warm while you finish cooking. Easy to Clean, Even Easier to Use Just rinse or pop it in the dishwasher. Designed for hassle-free cleaning after every use. Nordic Quality You Can Trust Proudly crafted in Finland with durable, BPA-free plastic. Combines Nordic design with long-lasting durability. GastroMax Micro cover Ø 25 cm Reheat with confidence and keep your microwave clean Do Not Use with Heating Plates or Pizza Trays These accessories can reach very high temperatures and may damage the cover. Be Cautious with Dry Foods Dry ingredients like oats, bran flakes, or breadcrumbs can heat rapidly and may pose a fire risk. Always add moisture or avoid microwaving such items. Cleaning Wash by hand or in the dishwasher. For best results, place in the upper rack and avoid tightly packing. Safe Use Guidelines Microwave Only SmartStore Micro Cover is designed exclusively for microwave use. Do not use in conventional ovens, on stovetops, or under grills. Place the cover loosely over your food. Ensure it does not touch the food directly , and always keep the ventilation hole clear to allow steam to escape safely. Temperature Limit The cover is made from material that withstands temperatures up to 100 °C . In microwaves, food can sometimes exceed this temperature, especially items high in fat or sugar. To avoid damage: Use for short heating periods only Monitor food while heating Avoid overheating
